instructions.emptyDescription: Tell your agent how it should think and act.
instructions.helper: How this agent should think and act.

learnings.emptyDescription: The agent jots things down as it works, or you can add them yourself.
learnings.helper: Quick notes the agent picks up over time.
learnings.inputPlaceholder: Type a learning and press Enter…
learnings.confirmRemoveDescription: The agent will lose this note. You can add it back later.

projectContext.title: Project context
projectContext.description: Injected into all agents. Describe your project, conventions, and rules.
projectContext.placeholder: Project context, coding conventions, architecture notes...

agentPrompts.title: Agent prompts
agentPrompts.description: Each agent mode gets its own system prompt.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Reusable instructions the agents can use.

learnings.title: Learnings
learnings.description: Agents save learnings as they work. You can add them manually too.

settings.title: Settings
settings.worktreeModeDescription: Create a separate git worktree for each mission
settings.installCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm install, npm install, cargo build
settings.devCommandPlaceholder: e.g. pnpm dev, npm run dev, cargo run

files.emptyDescription: Files created by your assistant will appear here.
